2. Inspect JSON response properties.
Expected Result: JSON payload excludes sensitive fields such as passwordHash, salt, or security questions.
Actual Result: JSON payload excludes sensitive fields such as passwordHash, salt, or security questions.

Description: Directory Path Traversal vulnerability filtering
Steps:
1. Send GET request with '../../etc/passwd' filepath parameter.
2. Check file retrieval response.
Expected Result: API sanitizes path inputs, rejects request with 400 Bad Request or directory bounds checks.
Actual Result: API sanitizes path inputs, rejects request with 400 Bad Request or directory bounds checks.

Description: JWT signature validation bypass prevention check
Steps:
1. Modify token signature bits.
2. Attempt access to secure profile route.
Input Data: JWT token with invalid signature bits
Expected Result: Authentication middleware detects invalid signature, returns status 401 Unauthorized.
Actual Result: Authentication middleware detects invalid signature, returns status 401 Unauthorized.

Description: JWT expired token rejection check
Steps:
1. Generate token with exp timestamp set to past.
2. Request secure route endpoint.
Expected Result: Token validator checks expiration timestamp, returns status 401 Unauthorized.
Actual Result: Token validator checks expiration timestamp, returns status 401 Unauthorized.

Description: JWT algorithm 'none' spoofing attack block
Steps:
1. Send token with 'alg' header set to 'none' and signature stripped.
2. Check authentication.
Expected Result: Validator rejects 'none' algorithm token string, returning status 401 Unauthorized.
Actual Result: Validator rejects 'none' algorithm token string, returning status 401 Unauthorized.

Description: XML External Entity (XXE) parser injection block
Steps:
1. Post XML payload containing external entity definition to parser.
2. Check parser output.
Input Data: XML payload with system entity reference
Expected Result: Parser disables external entity resolution, ignoring or throwing parsing error.
Actual Result: Parser disables external entity resolution, ignoring or throwing parsing error.

Description: Server-Side Request Forgery url redirection block
Steps:
1. Request proxy route redirecting to internal IP 'http://169.254.169.254/'.
2. Verify output.
Expected Result: URL resolver blocks requests to loopback, private ranges, or internal addresses.
Actual Result: URL resolver blocks requests to loopback, private ranges, or internal addresses.

Description: Security and critical actions audit logs tracking check
Steps:
1. Trigger citizen password modification flow.
2. Inspect audit database log entry.
Expected Result: Logs modification timestamp, IP address, user ID, and action type (no plaintext passwords).
Actual Result: Logs modification timestamp, IP address, user ID, and action type (no plaintext passwords).

Description: Secure and HttpOnly flags on authentication cookies check
Steps:
1. Request login session cookie.
2. Inspect Cookie response properties.
Expected Result: Authentication cookies have HttpOnly, Secure, and SameSite=Strict flags active.
Actual Result: Authentication cookies have HttpOnly, Secure, and SameSite=Strict flags active.

Description: API input payload body size limits checks
Steps:
1. Send POST request with 50MB random text payload.
2. Check HTTP status code.
Expected Result: Blocks request immediately, returning status 413 Payload Too Large.
Actual Result: Blocks request immediately, returning status 413 Payload Too Large.

Description: Production stack trace verbose error output prevention
Steps:
1. Trigger database integrity crash on API route.
2. Inspect JSON response details.
Expected Result: API response contains general error message without code lines or database stack traces.
Actual Result: API response contains general error message without code lines or database stack traces.

Description: Strong password complexity enforcement on signup
Steps:
1. Register user with weak password '123'.
2. Validate signup verification API.
Expected Result: Registration blocks submission, showing error: 'Password must contain uppercase, numeric, and symbol characters'.
Actual Result: Registration blocks submission, showing error: 'Password must contain uppercase, numeric, and symbol characters'.

Description: Weak cipher suites and cryptographic hash validation
Steps:
1. Inspect password hashing implementation.
2. Check cipher algorithm parameters.
Expected Result: Uses secure Argon2id or bcrypt hashing with cost factor >= 10, no MD5/SHA1.
Actual Result: Uses secure Argon2id or bcrypt hashing with cost factor >= 10, no MD5/SHA1.

Description: Unauthenticated API route enumeration block
Steps:
1. Iterate API routes requests sequentially.
2. Inspect response metadata.
Expected Result: Returns status 401 Unauthorized for all routes except public landing / sign-up endpoints.
Actual Result: Returns status 401 Unauthorized for all routes except public landing / sign-up endpoints.

Description: Citizen profile modification IDOR verification check
Steps:
1. Submit profile updates for user 456 while authenticated as user 123.
2. Check database changes.
Expected Result: Modification transaction is blocked, database records remain unchanged.
Actual Result: Modification transaction is blocked, database records remain unchanged.

Description: Verify reset password token single-use execution checks
Steps:
1. Trigger password reset link generation.
2. Submit reset flow twice with same token.
Expected Result: API rejects second attempt, token invalidated immediately on first execution.
Actual Result: API rejects second attempt, token invalidated immediately on first execution.

Description: Verify password reset token expiration timeout limits
Steps:
1. Generate reset link with 1 hour expiration.
2. Attempt submit after 2 hours.
Expected Result: Token validator rejects expired session, returning token expired status 400.
Actual Result: Token validator rejects expired session, returning token expired status 400.

Description: Verify public key verification spoofing protection mechanisms
Steps:
1. Sign token with invalid public key algorithms.
2. Attempt authentication.
Expected Result: Signature verification checks reject key mismatch, returning status 401.
Actual Result: Signature verification checks reject key mismatch, returning status 401.

Description: Verify blind SQL injection timing attack prevention checks
Steps:
1. Send parameter request containing pg_sleep() timing delay query.
2. Inspect response latency.
Expected Result: Queries escape parameter strings, executing instantly without database execution delay.
Actual Result: Queries escape parameter strings, executing instantly without database execution delay.

Description: Verify CORS wildcard origin blocking policies on secure APIs
Steps:
1. Send API request with Origin header from external site.
2. Check Access-Control-Allow-Origin.
Input Data: Secure route request with wildcard Origin header
Expected Result: CORS handler rejects wildcard * responses, restricting to explicit whitelist origins.
Actual Result: CORS handler rejects wildcard * responses, restricting to explicit whitelist origins.

Description: Verify access control on analytics data exports downloads
Steps: 1. Send data download request without supervisor role privileges.
Expected Result: Access controller rejects request, returning 403 Forbidden validation status.
Actual Result: Access controller rejects request, returning 403 Forbidden validation status.

Description: Verify rate limiter restrictions on rapid token refresh API endpoints
Steps: 1. Trigger token refresh API rapidly 50 times in 10 seconds.
Expected Result: Rate limiting locks refresh route, returning status 429 Too Many Requests.
Actual Result: Rate limiting locks refresh route, returning status 429 Too Many Requests.

Description: Verify protection policies on security audit log files
Steps: 1. Send POST request attempting modification of audit log database entries.
Expected Result: Database access permissions restrict logs to read-only inserts, blocking modification.
Actual Result: Database access permissions restrict logs to read-only inserts, blocking modification.

Description: Verify user phone number masking rules on public lists API
Steps:
1. Retrieve public complaints feed listing.
2. Inspect profile contact fields.
Expected Result: JSON response filters or obfuscates phone number strings (e.g. +91******3210).
Actual Result: JSON response filters or obfuscates phone number strings (e.g. +91******3210).

Description: Verify SSRF url resolver protocol schema restrictions
Steps: 1. Request proxy redirect using file:// or ftp:// protocol formats.
Expected Result: Proxy resolver blocks invalid protocol schemas, allowing only HTTP/HTTPS.
Actual Result: Proxy resolver blocks invalid protocol schemas, allowing only HTTP/HTTPS.

Description: Verify comment output HTML escaping rendering security rules
Steps:
1. Submit comments containing HTML script tag blocks.
2. Verify output.
Expected Result: Escapes data variables dynamically before rendering comments in UI.
Actual Result: Escapes data variables dynamically before rendering comments in UI.

Description: Verify search text parameter query parameterized bindings
Steps:
1. Send search query containing SQL delimiters.
2. Verify query compile.
Expected Result: Executes searches using database queries parameters placeholders.
Actual Result: Executes searches using database queries parameters placeholders.

Description: Verify query sanitizer operators strips invalid object arguments
Steps: 1. Submit login API parameters containing nested query operator objects.
Expected Result: Filters out object type parameters on non-object inputs.
Actual Result: Filters out object type parameters on non-object inputs.

Description: Verify CSRF token validation on user registration endpoint
Steps: 1. Submit user registration post without CSRF verification headers.
Expected Result: Rejects sign-up requests if valid CSRF token is missing.
Actual Result: Rejects sign-up requests if valid CSRF token is missing.

Description: Verify access control checks on notification details retrieval
Steps: 1. Request notification details belonging to user 456 authenticated as 123.
Expected Result: Blocks reading notifications belonging to other user profiles.
Actual Result: Blocks reading notifications belonging to other user profiles.

Description: Verify officer route authorization validations parameters checking
Steps: 1. Send request to officer-only endpoint authenticated as citizen.
Expected Result: Restricts officer-specific actions to officer/admin role tokens.
Actual Result: Restricts officer-specific actions to officer/admin role tokens.

Description: Verify request throttling rules on password recovery routes
Steps: 1. Send multiple rapid password recovery requests for single email.
Expected Result: Locks reset requests to 3 per hour per email address.
Actual Result: Locks reset requests to 3 per hour per email address.

Description: Verify CORS allowed credentials configuration settings parameters
Steps: 1. Request CORS preflight allowance with credentials flag active.
Expected Result: Disallows credentials sharing with wildcard origins.
Actual Result: Disallows credentials sharing with wildcard origins.

Description: Verify referrer policy header parameters configuration settings
Steps:
1. Request root API headers details.
2. Locate Referrer-Policy header.
Expected Result: Sets Referrer-Policy header to strict-origin-when-cross-origin.
Actual Result: Sets Referrer-Policy header to strict-origin-when-cross-origin.

Description: Verify IP address login request rate limits rules check
Steps: 1. Send multiple invalid login requests from single IP address.
Expected Result: Locks IP address if brute force activity thresholds are crossed.
Actual Result: Locks IP address if brute force activity thresholds are crossed.

Description: Verify error messages data masking policies configurations
Steps:
1. Trigger server exception.
2. Verify output variables masking.

Expected Result: Strips internal database paths, names, and queries from errors.
Actual Result: Strips internal database paths, names, and queries from errors.

Description: Verify profile photo filepath traversal sanitization rules
Steps: 1. Input filename path containing folder traversal operators.
Expected Result: Sanitizes filename inputs, restricting paths to storage folder.
Actual Result: Sanitizes filename inputs, restricting paths to storage folder.

Description: Verify JWT signature algorithms blacklist filter configurations
Steps: 1. Authenticate using token signed with blacklisted algorithm.
Expected Result: Restricts signature algorithms to RS256/HS256 configurations only.
Actual Result: Restricts signature algorithms to RS256/HS256 configurations only.

Description: Verify concurrent session login limits checks enforcement rules
Steps: 1. Login user profile consecutively on multiple concurrent devices.
Expected Result: Invalidates older tokens if user logs in on new device (optional constraint).
Actual Result: Invalidates older tokens if user logs in on new device (optional constraint).

Description: Verify API upload file counts limits validations rules
Steps: 1. Submit file upload payload exceeding maximum file count.

Expected Result: Blocks uploads if request exceeds maximum 3 files concurrently.
Actual Result: Blocks uploads if request exceeds maximum 3 files concurrently.
